BackstoryDef.title: Redeemed Drifter
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was abandoned as a child but found a new family through grit and machines. The scars remain, but they no longer define [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: Scarred Ghost
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] never escaped the abandonment. The machines that once saved [PAWN_objective] now feel like another kind of cage. [PAWN_pronoun] keeps moving because stopping is worse.

BackstoryDef.title: Redeemed Foundling
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was abandoned long ago, but has finally built the family [PAWN_pronoun] never had. The wound is still there, yet it no longer bleeds.

BackstoryDef.title: Scarred Orphan
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] was abandoned and never truly found a home. The emptiness inside has only grown deeper with time. [PAWN_pronoun] trusts no one easily, and perhaps never will.

BackstoryDef.title: Restored Noble
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] has reclaimed [PAWN_possessive] lineage - not only as a birthright, but as something [PAWN_nameDef] earned through sacrifice. The title sits differently now. Lighter, somehow, and more real.

BackstoryDef.title: Bitter Exile
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The house is gone. The name carries nothing now but old enemies and older debts. [PAWN_nameDef] walks the Rim without title or purpose, wearing the silence of someone who has lost everything they were raised to be.

BackstoryDef.title: Peacekeeper
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] has finally made peace with what the war made [PAWN_objective]. The rifle is still close at hand - but now it is held in defence of something, not just in service of someone. The difference matters more than [PAWN_pronoun] can say.

BackstoryDef.title: Warmonger
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The penance didn't take. [PAWN_nameDef] tried to face what [PAWN_pronoun] did and found only one conclusion: [PAWN_pronoun] was good at it. The war didn't break [PAWN_objective]. It finished [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: Redeemed Mechanic
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] finally made peace with the wreck that nearly killed [PAWN_objective]. The machines no longer haunt [PAWN_pronoun] - they obey. [PAWN_pronoun] builds now without flinching at the sound of metal on metal.

BackstoryDef.title: Haunted Wreck Survivor
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] survived the crash, but the machines [PAWN_pronoun] once loved now feel like ghosts that refuse to stay dead. Every panel [PAWN_pronoun] opens, every circuit [PAWN_pronoun] repairs - something watches from inside the metal.

BackstoryDef.title: Reconciled Tribesman
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] has made peace between the old ways and the new. The spirits no longer demand [PAWN_pronoun] choose sides. [PAWN_pronoun] carries both worlds now - and finds they are not as incompatible as [PAWN_pronoun] once feared.

BackstoryDef.title: Broken Tribesman
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The old gods turned their backs on [PAWN_nameDef]. [PAWN_pronoun] walks the Rim carrying the shame of a warrior who failed [PAWN_possessive] people. The rites were performed correctly. They simply did not answer.

BackstoryDef.title: Guardian of the Peace
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] once refused all violence. After facing true horror, [PAWN_pronoun] learned to protect what matters - though the guilt of that transition lingers. [PAWN_pronoun] still hopes violence will be the last resort. It has not always been.

BackstoryDef.title: Shattered Pacifist
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The conviction is gone. [PAWN_nameDef] held to their principles until the world broke them against it. What remains isn't peace - it's exhaustion wearing peace's face. [PAWN_pronoun] no longer argues about violence. [PAWN_pronoun] simply does what is asked.

BackstoryDef.title: Redeemed Scholar
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The question [PAWN_nameDef] spent a lifetime chasing has finally been answered. The hunger that drove [PAWN_objective] from world to world is quiet now - not satisfied exactly, but stilled. [PAWN_pronoun] can sit in silence without it feeling like failure.

BackstoryDef.title: Broken Scholar
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The last archive burned. The knowledge [PAWN_nameDef] spent a lifetime chasing is gone forever, and something inside [PAWN_pronoun] burned with it. [PAWN_pronoun] still reads - but the hunger is gone, replaced by something colder and less useful.

BackstoryDef.title: Redeemed Rogue
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The last debt is paid. [PAWN_nameDef] has walked away from the underworld with [PAWN_possessive] soul mostly intact. The contacts are still there. The skills are still sharp. [PAWN_pronoun] simply chooses not to use them the way [PAWN_pronoun] once did.

BackstoryDef.title: Shadowed Criminal
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The past refuses to stay buried. Every shadow still feels like someone coming to collect what [PAWN_nameDef] owes. [PAWN_pronoun] has stopped pretending otherwise. The only advantage the underworld ever gave [PAWN_objective] was knowing what it looked like from inside.

BackstoryDef.title: Redeemed Freed Slave
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The chains are gone. [PAWN_nameDef] has finally learned what it truly means to be free - not just from the slavers, but from the fear that followed [PAWN_objective] long after the collar came off. [PAWN_pronoun] builds things now. Walls. Roofs. Things that belong to [PAWN_objective].

BackstoryDef.title: Broken Slave
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Freedom came too late or cost too much. [PAWN_nameDef] is no longer owned - but the habits of captivity run deeper than any collar. [PAWN_pronoun] defers when [PAWN_pronoun] should resist. [PAWN_pronoun] apologises for existing. The ring around [PAWN_possessive] neck is invisible now and heavier for it.

BackstoryDef.title: Reconciled Survivor
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] is the only one left. That used to feel like a sentence. Somewhere along the way it became a responsibility instead. [PAWN_pronoun] carries the others in the way [PAWN_pronoun] works - carefully, without waste, as though someone is still watching to see if [PAWN_pronoun] makes it count.

BackstoryDef.title: Hollow Survivor
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] survived. [PAWN_pronoun] is still not sure why. The others were better - kinder, braver, more deserving of a future. [PAWN_pronoun] moves through the days because stopping would require a reason, and [PAWN_pronoun] hasn't found one yet that satisfies.

BackstoryDef.title: Reunited
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] found them. Or found what remained. Either way, the not-knowing is over - and with it, a particular kind of loneliness that [PAWN_pronoun] had carried so long [PAWN_pronoun] had stopped noticing its weight. [PAWN_pronoun] is lighter now. It shows.

BackstoryDef.title: Grief-Bound
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The search ended. What [PAWN_nameDef] found was not what [PAWN_pronoun] hoped for. [PAWN_pronoun] returned from it changed in ways [PAWN_pronoun] cannot fully explain to people who weren't there. [PAWN_pronoun] is still functioning. [PAWN_pronoun] does not always know why.

BackstoryDef.title: Redeemed Healer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] has finally made peace with the lives [PAWN_pronoun] could not save. [PAWN_pronoun] heals with steadier hands now. The dead are still with [PAWN_objective] - but they no longer shake [PAWN_possessive] grip when it matters.

BackstoryDef.title: Tormented Healer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Every patient [PAWN_nameDef] loses leaves another scar. The guilt has grown heavier than any wound [PAWN_pronoun] has ever treated. [PAWN_pronoun] still heals - because what else is there - but [PAWN_pronoun] no longer believes it is enough.

BackstoryDef.title: Redeemed Artist
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The blank canvas no longer terrifies [PAWN_nameDef]. [PAWN_pronoun] has finally found the courage to create again - not for approval, not for survival, but because something inside [PAWN_objective] demands expression and [PAWN_pronoun] has stopped fighting it.

BackstoryDef.title: Tormented Artist
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The muse left long ago. Now every brushstroke feels like a lie [PAWN_nameDef] can no longer sell - even to [PAWN_possessive]self. [PAWN_pronoun] makes things because [PAWN_pronoun] was trained to. None of it means what it once did.

BackstoryDef.title: Redeemed Beastmaster
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The animals trust [PAWN_nameDef] again. After years of fear and pain, [PAWN_pronoun] has finally become the handler [PAWN_pronoun] always wanted to be. The bond is quieter now than it once was - less desperate. More honest.

BackstoryDef.title: Broken Handler
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The animals sense the fear in [PAWN_nameDef] now. The bond [PAWN_pronoun] once had is gone, replaced by something colder and more careful. [PAWN_pronoun] works with them because [PAWN_pronoun] has to. They tolerate [PAWN_objective] for the same reason.

BackstoryDef.title: Redeemed Hunter
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] no longer hunts only to survive. [PAWN_pronoun] has learned the difference between taking life and respecting it. The rifle is still accurate. The hand behind it has simply grown more deliberate.

BackstoryDef.title: Ghost Hunter
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: The prey [PAWN_nameDef] once tracked now hunts [PAWN_pronoun] in [PAWN_possessive] dreams. The rifle feels heavier every season. [PAWN_pronoun] still goes out. [PAWN_pronoun] just takes longer to pull the trigger than [PAWN_pronoun] used to.

BackstoryDef.title: Settled Wanderer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] has walked the Rim for years with no home. [PAWN_pronoun] has finally found a place worth staying - and people worth staying for. The road still calls sometimes. [PAWN_pronoun] has learned to let it call without answering.

BackstoryDef.title: Scarred Drifter
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] has walked too many roads and left too many things behind. The Rim has taken more from [PAWN_objective] than it has given. [PAWN_pronoun] keeps moving because it is the only thing [PAWN_pronoun] has ever been any good at.
